title: Remy (clone trooper)
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Remy}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Remy.jpg]] |name=Remy |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Ragmar V]]{{CWACite|5|The Order of Outcasts}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him{{CSWECite|III|91|Remy, Sergeant}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Execute Order 66!|Remy orders his clone troopers to kill Joc Sah|}} '''Remy''' was a [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|clone trooper sergeant]] who served in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. At some point during the conflict, he was placed under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Joc Sah]]. In the war's [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]], Remy accompanied the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Ragmar V]], which was considered a vital staging planet for a planned Republic attack on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] base. After arriving in Ragmar V's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], Remy, Sah, and a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] traveled down to the planet's surface in order to capture a settlement for use as a base. As Remy, Sah, and their [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] confronted [[Gaan|the nearby settlement's leader]], Remy received a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] commanding him to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which labeled the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] as traitors of the Republic. Remy and his forces immediately attacked Sah, but both he and his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Battle of Ragmar V|ensuing skirmish]] with the settlement's villagers. ==Biography== {{Quote|There's a primitive settlement a few klicks from here. Several life forms detected, sir.''"
"''Let's hope they're sympathetic to the Republic.|Remy and Joc Sah|}} [[File:RemyAndJocSah.jpg|left|thumb|300px|Sergeant Remy and Jedi Joc Sah come under attack on Rahmar V]] A [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], one [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|clone trooper sergeant]] received the nickname Remy at some point during his life. Remy served in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], which [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|began]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].{{Film|II}} He was eventually placed under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Sev (Jedi)|Sev]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Joc Sah]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Remy traveled with Sev and Sah to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ragmar V]], which was viewed as an essential staging planet that the Republic needed for a planned assault on a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] base. Remy accompanied Sah and a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] aboard a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]], landing on a cliff near a settlement. After disembarking the [[Starship/Legends|ship]], Remy informed Sah that the village was populated. When the gunship was destroyed by a [[Missile/Legends|rocket]] coming from the village soon thereafter, Sah ordered Remy to prepare to confront the villagers and descended the cliff in order to make it to the settlement. [[File:RemyDeath.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Remy is shot and killed by Gaan during the battle of Ragmar V]] As the soldiers arrived at the village, Sah ordered Remy to split up his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and secure the village's flanks. However, during the subsequent exchange between Sah and the settlement's leader, [[Gaan]],{{CSWECite|I|305|Gaan}} Remy was [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|commanded]] by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], directing him to treat Sah as an enemy of the Republic and to ensure his [[Death/Legends|death]]. Remy immediately ordered the clones to [[Battle of Ragmar V|direct their fire]] at the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who took cover in a nearby building. When Gaan, who wanted to kill the Jedi himself, shot one of the soldiers, Remy and his troops came under attack from the villagers. Sah and Gaan allied with each other to eliminate the clones, and Remy was shot and killed by the settlement's leader, ending the skirmish. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Sergeant—split your squad, and secure the flanks.''"
"''Yes, sir.|Joc Sah and Remy|}} [[File:RemyInFight.jpg|left|thumb|300px|Remy and clone troopers are in the fight]] Like most clone troopers, Remy was bred to be utterly loyal to the Republic and to follow his orders from [[Commanding officer/Legends|superior officers]]. He made it a point to inform Joc Sah of the settlement on Ragmar V and followed the Padawan's orders without question. However, his loyalty to the Republic—combined with the presence of the [[Inhibitor chip/Legends|inhibitor chip]] implanted into the brain of each clone{{TCW|Orders (episode)}}—prompted him to execute Order 66 without hesitation and turn on the Jedi Order, though he failed to eliminate Sah. ==Equipment== Remy wore a set of [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone armor]] adorned in [[red]] and used a pair of [[DC-17 hand blaster/Legends|DC-17s]] during combat. ==Behind the scenes== Remy was introduced in the short story ''[[The Order of Outcasts]]'', which was one of four stories compiled in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|fifth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. The character was created by [[Matt Jacobs]] and drawn by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]]. Remy later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|5|The Order of Outcasts}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Remy }} [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
